message:
fix(engine): graceful fallback for missing split metrics in benchmark delta summary

Replace .expect() panics with .unwrap_or(&zero) when looking up split
metrics in build_delta_summary for both PreviousSnapshot and
PreviousStage/ShortcutBaseline reference kinds. Missing metrics now
produce a zero-valued delta summary instead of crashing, which can
occur when a split key exists in the gate input but has no
corresponding entry in the snapshot's split_metrics map (e.g. during
split topology changes or partial snapshot rebuilds).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
